title: Did God purposely overlay events in leading Israel that would telegraph to pagans their Doom within their own literary religious mythical frameworks?
author: joshualinog
excerpt: Is it possible that God LED Israel to perform certain actions and patterns that would have happened in ancient near Eastern literary compositions in order to telegraph to Israel themselves for their o
body: Is it possible that God LED Israel to perform certain actions and patterns that would have happened in ancient near Eastern literary compositions in order to telegraph to Israel themselves for their own strength mentally, and to telegraph too ancient near East gentiles for their breaking down mentally and doom?
